mapper.select: SELECT "id", "creator_id", "creation_time", "modifier_id", "modification_time", "llm_call_id", "message_order", "role", "content", "content_parts", "tool_call_id" FROM "conversation_llm_request_message" WHERE "llm_call_id" = #{llmCallId} ORDER BY "message_order" ASC

SELECT message."id", message."creator_id", message."creation_time", message."modifier_id", message."modification_time", message."llm_call_id", message."message_order", message."role", message."content", message."content_parts", message."tool_call_id" FROM "conversation_turn" turn INNER JOIN "conversation_llm_call" call ON call."turn_id" = turn."id" INNER JOIN "conversation_llm_request_message" message ON message."llm_call_id" = call."id" WHERE turn."round_id" = #{roundId} ORDER BY turn."turn_number", message."message_order"
